title: GoldenPayload
description: The irreducible geometric primitive of a Spacedeck settlement intent.

intent_id.description: Unique deterministic identifier for the intent.

source_asset.description: The asset to be liquidated (e.g., USDC, SOL).

amount_usd.description: The total value of the intent in USD manifest.

wallet_id.description: The physical wallet address authorized for the strike.
